title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at BHIVE Workspace

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at BHIVE Workspace
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
